problem_statement:
# 功能要求
1. 增强 Flask 模板缓存配置选项
2. 当前 TEMPLATES_AUTO_RELOAD 配置过于简单，无法满足生产环境的细粒度需求
3. 新增配置项：
   - TEMPLATE_CACHE_MODE (auto/hash/always/never)
   - TEMPLATE_CACHE_SIZE (缓存大小限制)
   - TEMPLATE_HASH_ALGO (内容哈希算法)
4. 新增模板加载器：HashingFileSystemLoader，支持基于内容哈希的缓存验证
5. 新增 LRU 缓存：LRUTemplateCache，支持大小限制的缓存
6. 确保向后兼容，不破坏现有功能
patch:
diff --git a/src/flask/app.py b/src/flask/app.py
index 652b9bbf..f889130d 100644
--- a/src/flask/app.py
+++ b/src/flask/app.py
@@ -236,6 +236,9 @@ class Flask(App):
             "EXPLAIN_TEMPLATE_LOADING": False,
             "PREFERRED_URL_SCHEME": "http",
             "TEMPLATES_AUTO_RELOAD": None,
+            "TEMPLATE_CACHE_MODE": "auto",
+            "TEMPLATE_CACHE_SIZE": 200,
+            "TEMPLATE_HASH_ALGO": "md5",
             "MAX_COOKIE_SIZE": 4093,
             "PROVIDE_AUTOMATIC_OPTIONS": True,
diff --git a/src/flask/templating.py b/src/flask/templating.py
index 005108cc..966083bb 100644
--- a/src/flask/templating.py
+++ b/src/flask/templating.py
@@ -1,6 +1,9 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
+import hashlib
+from collections import OrderedDict
+from functools import lru_cache
 from jinja2 import BaseLoader
 from jinja2 import Environment as BaseEnvironment
 from jinja2 import Template
test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_templating.py b/tests/test_templating.py
index 85549df0..849bca0a 100644
--- a/tests/test_templating.py
+++ b/tests/test_templating.py
@@ -530,3 +530,58 @@ def test_custom_jinja_env():
 
     app = CustomFlask(__name__)
     assert isinstance(app.jinja_env, CustomEnvironment)
+
+
+def test_template_cache_config_defaults(app):
+    assert app.config["TEMPLATE_CACHE_MODE"] == "auto"
+    assert app.config["TEMPLATE_CACHE_SIZE"] == 200
+    assert app.config["TEMPLATE_HASH_ALGO"] == "md5"
